title: FortCraft
description: Have you ever wished to ruin Minecraft? No? I don't care. add to your world to have "Fun"
body:
~~Fortnite~~ Minecraft is a third-person shooter game where up to 100 players compete to be the last person or team standing. You can compete alone or join a team of up to four. You progress through the game by exploring the island, collecting weapons, building fortifications and engaging in combat with other players. You can make purchases for access to the full game or for bonus weapons. Players communicate with other players through online messaging or voice chat. ~~Fortnite~~ Minecraft Battle Royale is a free version of the ~~Fortnite~~ Minecraft game. 

 **Real Description:**
 
 This Project is made for comical purposes only, don't take this seriously!
<details>
<summary>Spoilers</summary>

![The Impasta, spawns in the fortnite biomes and will kill you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e69a719fb19d56bb277532fa80664169a908d37.png)

The Impasta, spawns in the fortnite biomes and will kill you, he is super fast but has only 0.1 health points so you can 1 hit him!
![YOU JUST GOT RICKROLLED (and killed)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/616d92dbbb99c868ddbab45916fab27ad8053f26.png)

YOU JUST GOT RICKROLLED (and killed)
the rickroll mob will randomly spawn and try to kill you while making strange sounds.

theres also a new fortnite biome where almost everything is blue and trees are reversed, the mod doesnt really add anything else. its whole purpose is to ruin your day!
</details>
